raw: Each pass allows admission for up to 2 adults at 50% off and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children 6 and under are always admitted free. The Museum of Fine Arts strongly encourages you to reserve your tickets online in advance—check mfa.org for the most up-to-date availability. Special ticketed exhibitions still require a timed-entry ticket. To reserve discounted tickets online, visit Tickets , select the date and type of ticket, and enter the promo code on the top right corner of the next page, which will activate the reduced admission rate. You will need to create a free user account at mfa.org if you do not already have one. This is not a physical pass. Reserve the pass, and you will receive an email with a unique promo code within 48 hours. This pass is sponsored in part by a generous donation from Dinah Voorhies

source_phrases.free_under_age: Children 6 and under are always admitted free
